description: Product description Specifications: Color: Red & Green & White Features: 1.Bring a festive touch to your celebrations with this set of 5000 Christmas round confetti dots, featuring a vibrant mix of red, green, and white colors. 2.Whether you're decorating tables, filling transparent balloons, or preparing for a confetti toss, these mix red green white paper confettis are sure to enhance the festive atmosphere of any occasion. 3.Sprinkle these colorful tissue christmas round confetti dots across tables to instantly elevate your Christmas, Valentine's Day, or wedding décor. 4. For an added festive flair, fill transparent balloons or ornaments with the red green white table confetti dots tissue to create a magical, holiday-inspired look. 5. These mix red green white confetti dots are also perfect for hand-held throwing during special moments like weddings or birthdays, adding a memorable touch to your celebration.
